mapper.select: select system_id, system_name, system_info, use_flag from cotdl.tbl_piisystem order by system_id
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piisystem (system_id, system_name, system_info, use_flag) values (#{system_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system_info, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{use_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piisystem (system_id, system_name, system_info, use_flag) values (#{system_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{system_info, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{use_flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
